data.content: All three implementation children (681b, 47a2, 1061) fixed and advanced to implementation_review. Changes in commit 1014cbb68978 on branch work/foolery-d984-impl-20260322: (1) Worker now properly rejects is_error=true result events and re-enqueues on backend.get failure. (2) Beat creation test exercises real POST /api/beats route. (3) Status endpoint test calls real GET handler. (4) Notification hook logic extracted to testable filterNewCompletions with full test coverage. All quality gates pass: 163 test files, 2186 tests, zero lint errors, zero type errors, build succeeds.
